## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Motivation / Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Example Usage / API Design

If applicable, provide an example of how this feature would be used:

```yaml
# Example config snippet
base_model: meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf
# your proposed new config options here
```

```python
# Or example Python API usage
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this feature hasn't been requested before
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case for this feature
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a PR for this feature (optional)
